title: Modernized Skyblock
description: A collection of 1.21+ mods for Hypixel Skyblock. Contains both skyblock-specific mods and general qol and performance mods.
body:
## What is this pack for?
I got frustrated with the lack of additional mods and updates in the [Skyblocker](https://modrinth.com/modpack/skyblocker-modpack) modpack. The modpack is designed for the [Hypixel](https://hypixel.net/) minecraft server, although includes generic performance mods that are viable anywhere. 
The mods used are based on ToadStar0's old modlist, but have been updated to 1.21.1 

<details>
<summary>Included Mods</summary>

## Skyblock QOL Mods
- [Aaron’s Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/aaron-mod/)
- [cookies-mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/cookies-mod)
- [Custom Scoreboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-custom-scoreboard)
- [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament)
- [Skyblocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblocker-liap)
- [skylper](https://modrinth.com/mod/skylper)

## General QOL Mods
- [ChatCalc](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-calc)
- [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches)
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders)
- [Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen)
- [Dynamic Fps](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Edgeless Chat Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/edgeless-chat-screen)
- [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches)
- [Full Brightness Toggle](https://modrinth.com/mod/full-brightness-toggle)
- [GUI Scale Splitter](https://modrinth.com/mod/gui-scale-splitter)
- [MixinTrace](https://modrinth.com/mod/mixintrace)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)
- [Roughly Enough Items (REI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Sodium Extra Information](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra-information)
- [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll)

## Performance Mods
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [CullLeaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [Particle Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-core)
- [Server Resourcepack Checker](https://modrinth.com/mod/server-resource-pack-checker)
- [Server Pinger Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpingerfixer)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [ThreadTweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/threadtweak)

## Library Mods
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/mod/collective)
- [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Fzzy Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/fzzy-config)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Included Resourcepacks</summary>
  
- [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode)
- [Enhanced Boss Bars](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enhanced-boss-bars)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Included Shaders</summary>

- [Complementary Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) (modified by the included [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches) mod)

</details>
